name: Amy Bonton
bio: Amy Bonton serves as the Mayor of Woodville, the county seat of Tyler County. Woodville is home to the Heritage Village Museum, which preserves the history of East Texas pioneer life. The mayor works with the city council to maintain city services and promote the community's cultural heritage.
campaignPromises: Promote Heritage Village Museum and local tourism
Improve city infrastructure and road maintenance
Support economic development and small businesses
Maintain public safety and emergency services
Enhance community programs and recreational facilities
